{{Infobox character
| name = Rebel Queen of Karosha
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator has allied themselves with the [[Rebel Queen of Karosha]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Rebel Queen of Karosha]] is mentioned by [[Benri]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21">''The Knight'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Raion]]'s crew took up with the [[Rebel Queen of Karosha]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
